No props required.description: ContextMenuManager is a singleton. Mount it once at the app root; it manages all context menu state internally.

event.description: The mouse event from onContextMenu or onClick. Used to position the menu.

menus.description: Array of menu items to display.

label.description: Text shown for the menu item.

icon.description: Optional icon placed before the label.

command.description: Callback invoked when the item is clicked.

separator.description: When true, renders a visual divider instead of a clickable item.

seperator.description: Deprecated. Misspelled alias for `separator` kept for backwards compatibility — prefer `separator` in new code.

id.description: Optional identifier passed to the command callback.
